api: GitHub REST API (https://api.github.com) plus selected GitHub GraphQL API operations
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every repository-scoped endpoint (/repos/{owner}/{repo}/...) in GitHub REST API v3 1.1.4 is enumerated below (500 real operations, plus close_issue/close_pull_request and reopen_issue/reopen_pull_request rows documenting write-action reuse of the update_issue/update_pull_request endpoints, plus the github_app AuthHook token-exchange endpoint). This surface also includes selected fixed GitHub GraphQL operations that back gh-inspired Projects and Discussions CLI commands. Org-level, user-level, enterprise-level, and Enterprise Cloud/Server admin surfaces remain out of scope unless represented by an explicit GraphQL command row below.

operation.reason: auth token-exchange endpoint used internally by the github_app AuthHook, not a syncable data stream or a directly caller-invoked write action
single artifact detail/delete; the workflow_artifacts stream already covers the list data, and per-id deletion of build artifacts is a low-value cleanup action not modeled as a write this pass
operation.duplicate_of: single artifact detail/delete; the workflow_artifacts stream already covers the list data, and per-id deletion of build artifacts is a low-value cleanup action not modeled as a write this pass
